notes: SHIP 2 (Part A) — Snapshot → live deployment (Master Pivot, step 2 of 3). A staged scope (PHANTOM_JOBSNAP_STORE, 'phantom_jobsnap_v1') now becomes a real deployment whose working racks are seeded FROM THE SNAPSHOT, not the live Master. (1) SEEDER (pure composition, no new inference): mscope_buildRacksFromSnapshot runs each frozen cab through the existing master_rackToElevation, then shapes it as the EDP-style rack record {name:cabId, room:locode, totalU, slots} that deploy_seedRacksAndPhases already consumes; RU-less hosts attach as rack.notes 'UNPLACED: …' (no invented positions). master_rackToElevation slots gain ADDITIVE serial+dns so TAG/DNS ride into the working racks — the MASTER tab elevation renders identically (additive keys, existing renderers ignore unknowns). (2) FINALIZE via the proven path: mscope_createDeployment → _deploy_create_postIntake(results, name, lead, raw, hash, scope) with a TRAILING OPTIONAL scope param so the EDP 5-arg caller is unaffected; raw = a 'MASTER SCOPE · <site> · N cabs: …' provenance string, hash = 'mscope_'+sourceFileHash+'_'+stagedAt (namespaced — can never collide with a real hex EDP hash), scope = {source:'master', sourceFileHash, siteCode, selectedCabIds, stagedAt, snapshotConsumedAt} attached to the deployment record. Existing guards (DEPLOY_RACK_CAP 600, deploy_validateStorageHeadroom, seed-failure rollback) stay authoritative — not duplicated. (3) LIFECYCLE: on a successful Master-scoped create the jobsnap is cleared (consumed) on the SUCCESS path ONLY; any failure leaves the snapshot intact (retry-safe). (4) UX: mscope_renderStaged gains DEPLOYMENT NAME (required) + BUILD LEAD (optional) + CREATE DEPLOYMENT; deploy_showList shows a STAGED SCOPE resume banner (CREATE / DISCARD-with-confirm) so a staged scope is never strandable; mscope_open warns once when a snapshot is pending. INVARIANT (the freeze): the seeder reads ONLY the snapshot, never window._lastPhantomMaster — clearing or replacing the Master before create does not matter. EDP-as-architect path untouched and reachable (retires in Ship 3); Part B (EDP→Reconcile vendor cross-check) deferred to v1.6.90. VERIFIED: node-checked (both inline scripts + sw.js, valid version.json); browser end-to-end incl. the freeze test (phantom_clearMaster BEFORE create → still succeeds from the snapshot alone) and EDP-paste regression. Built in Claude Code on b302e71 (v1.6.88); web-Claude does post-merge parity review (one-builder rule). Three stamps at v1.6.89.
